description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: analysis, test, and deploy. In the analysis stage add a clang-tidy job using the base/archlinux:2018.09.01 image that runs sudo pacman -Syu --needed --noconfirm clang-tools-extra=6.0.1-2 and clang-tidy -warnings-as-errors=\"*\" -checks=\"-*,clang-analyzer-*,-clang-analyzer-alpha*\" lib/hello.cpp -- -Iinclude, setting CC=clang and CXX=clang++; add a cppcheck job using ubuntu:bionic that installs cppcheck and runs cppcheck lib/*.cpp --verbose --enable=all --inconclusive --language=c++ --error-exitcode=1; and a doxygen job using alpine:3.7 that installs doxygen and graphviz then runs doxygen docs/Doxyfile and stores build/docs/html/ as an artifact. In the test stage add a build-clang6 job using lasote/conanclang60 that updates apt, installs gcovr, creates a build directory, runs conan install .., cmake .., cmake --build ., then cmake --build . --target test, memcheck, and coverage; also add a build-gcc7 job using lasote/conangcc7 that installs gcovr, performs the same build steps, and publishes the build/coverage/ and build/test/Testing/Temporary/ directories as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy-bintray job using lasote/conangcc7 that installs curl, builds the project in Release mode without tests, creates a DEB package with cpack, and uploads the resulting .deb file to Bintray via curl using the $BINTRAY_API_KEY secret, storing the .deb as an artifact.
